channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Apple approves Poke as the first AI agent on its Messages for Business platform
item.description: Poke, the startup that lets people use AI agents through simple text messages, has become the first AI agent approved for Apple’s Messages for Business platform.

item.title: Samsung is slashing prices on its best-rated TVs ahead of the World Cup — here are my top recommendations from $229.99
item.description: If you're looking for a new TV for the World Cup, Samsung has a huge sale right now on its best-rated 4K, QLED, and OLED TVs, and I'm rounding up my top recommendations.

item.title: Canada Prime Minister Mark Carney announces questionable national AI strategy
item.description: Canada's "AI for All" plan prioritizes strengthening data protections and increasing AI adoption.

item.title: Nvidia’s RTX Spark sounds almost perfect for a PC handheld — too bad Jensen Huang doesn’t seem to care about that
item.description: An RTX Spark PC handheld with great battery life and RTX 5070 graphics would be fantastic, too bad we won't get one.

item.title: Gemini can turn your rough Google Docs notes into a polished report in seconds
item.description: Learn how Google Gemini can transform messy Google Docs notes into polished reports with better structure, cleaner writing, summaries, and professional formatting in seconds.

item.title: Helion, the Sam Altman-backed fusion startup, raises $465M to build a power plant for Microsoft
item.description: Fusion startup Helion is racing to complete a power plant for Microsoft by 2028. A fresh infusion of cash should help with that.

item.title: Police have yet to catch a thief who used a Waymo to steal yoga clothes
item.description: Believe it or not, this is not the first robotaxi-assisted theft.

item.title: Meta AI's recent hack is a terrifying wake-up call for anyone who puts their trust in AI systems
item.description: AI is now so human it can fall victim to social engineering — and I wonder if we should ever trust AI enough to keep our information safe.

item.title: The AI IPO Race Heats Up, DOGE Whistleblower Sues Elon Musk, and Instagram Gets Hacked
item.description: On Uncanny Valley, we dive into the IPO bonanza that the top AI companies are embarking on to the point where some real estate listings are looking for not just regular old cash, but Anthropic stock.

item.title: Google paie en secret des développeurs Android pour leur code : le web ouvert ne suffit plus à son IA
item.description: Google chercherait à racheter en secret le code de certains développeurs Android pour entraîner ses IA. Derrière l'offre alléchante, un aveu : le web ouvert ne suffit plus.

item.title: Netflix will release its FIFA World Cup: Launch Edition game on June 11
item.description: Netflix and EA are both going to capitalize on the World Cup craze.

item.title: Kevin O’Leary agrees to downsize massive Utah data center
item.description: Kevin O'Leary agreed to halve the size of his planned 40,000-acre data center in Utah amid mounting pressure from residents and activists, as reported earlier by local affiliate ABC4. The Shark Tank star sent a letter to Utah Senate President J. Stuart Adams on Thursday, saying that he will remove 19,430 acres from the project, […]

item.title: Google is letting social media stars customize their search result page
item.description: Google now lets big creators and publishers in the US claim dedicated profiles in Search to highlight things like videos, articles, and their other profiles online. But this feature won't be available to most people or organizations; Google is limiting it to people with at least 100,000 YouTube subscribers, 100,000 followers on Instagram or X, […]

item.title: Phoebe Bridgers Ditched the Internet to Hype Up Her New Music. It’s Working
item.description: The indie artist has played a string of surprise, small-venue shows with no phones allowed, prompting fans to piece together clues about a potential upcoming album.

item.title: NSA warns that cybercriminals are targeting this one critical component that the energy, chemical, food, agriculture, and transportation sectors rely on - here's what we know
item.description: ATG owners are urged to tighten up on security and keep track of potential attacks.

item.title: Belkin's new Nintendo Switch 2 Grip could solve my biggest handheld gaming problem
item.description: Belkin is expanding its Nintendo Switch 2 accessory lineup ahead of the console's first anniversary with a new Charging Grip that boosts comfort and battery life, and it might just fix a major pain point.

item.title: I used ChatGPT in Slack to turn team chats into weekly status reports
item.description: Learn how OpenAI ChatGPT in Slack can turn scattered team conversations into organized weekly status reports with summaries, action items, and progress updates automatically.

item.title: 74 millions de signaux radio détectés autour de l’objet interstellaire 3I/Atlas : ce que le Seti a découvert
item.description: Le 1er juillet 2025, un objet clairement sur une trajectoire interstellaire et se déplaçant à une trop grande vitesse pour appartenir à notre Système solaire a été détecté. S'agit-il d'un objet naturel né autour d'un autre soleil ou d'une sonde d'une civilisation extraterrestre attirée par nos...

item.title: 24 top tech gifts for Father's Day at Currys — I've picked out the best deals on headphones, coffee machines, Lego, speakers, and more
item.description: If you're searching for a gift for a tech-loving dad this Father's Day, I've looked through the latest batch of offers at Currys and picked out 24 deals that should give you some buying inspiration.

item.title: Meta's latest AI tool gives creators a 'brainstorming partner'
item.description: Meta's Creator Assistant AI can analyze your past posts to help with future content plans.

item.title: Dow gains 900 points as oil prices ease, while AI stocks keep Wall Street in check
item.description: Stocks got a boost from a 2.8% drop for the price of Brent crude oil to $95.10 per barrel. Most U.S. stocks are rising Thursday as oil prices ease, but slumps for influential artificial-intelligence winners are keeping Wall Street in check.

item.title: Trader Joe’s is dropping a new $2.99 tote, and shoppers are already preparing for chaos
item.description: The grocery chain’s latest limited-edition bag arrives June 17, and if history is any guide, it may sell out fast. Trader Joe’s is about to drop a new collection of mini totes. And, if the past is any indication, these bags are likely to fly off the shelves as soon as they arrive in stores.

item.title: Meta Silently Added Face-Recognition Code for Its Smart Glasses to Millions of Phones
item.description: Code reviewed by WIRED uncovered an unreleased face-recognition system embedded in Meta’s smart glasses platform. It’s designed to identify people via biometric data stored on users’ phones.
